title: Nightshade
description: Turns blossom petals + leaves into a purple tone.
body:
**Blossom leaves** / **Blossom petals** turned into a purple tone. _(May add cherry logs + cherry wood into purple aswell?) _
Just a texture pack I made for a specific build, and thought I'd publish it just incase anyone else needs something like it. message @pinkpawfennec on discord for support / questions!
